issue_title: Tags Input doesn't work inside form with stores
issue_body_preview:
If I use the tags input component inside a `<form>` it doesn't work as expected. When I type in the tag, after pressing enter the tag immediately disappears. I think this has to do something with svelte stores. 

If I use normal state variable like `let tags = $state([])`, this works inside form tag
test_description_zh: 在包含 Svelte store 绑定的 <form> 表单中使用 Tags Input 组件，输入一个标签文本后按下 Enter 键，观察标签是否被正确添加并保留在输入框中。
expected_result_zh: 在 form 表单内使用 store 绑定的 Tags Input 组件时，输入标签并按 Enter 后，标签应成功添加并持续显示在输入区域中，不会立即消失。
